content.query:
SELECT      OBT.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement Number]
,           TX40 AS [Trade Agreement Description]
,           TX15 AS [Trade Agreement Name]
,           OBT2.TREC AS [Sales Rep ID]
,           OBT3.OBV2 as [Brand]
,           CSM.OBV1 as [Sales Territory]
,           OBT2.FVDT as [From Date]
,           OBT2.TVDT as [To Date]
FROM        M3.OBTRAG OBT
JOIN        M3.OBTREC OBT2 ON OBT.TAGN = OBT2.TAGN
JOIN        M3.OBTMTX OBT3 on OBT.TAGN = OBT3.TAGN and OBT2.TREC = OBT3.OBV1
JOIN        M3.CSMCDX CSM on OBT3.OBV2 = CSM.OBV2 and CSM.SMD1 = OBT2.TREC
